title: Free vs. Paid Apps
drDigitalIntro:
Free and paid apps make money differently.
• Free apps may show ads, offer in-app purchases, or charge a subscription.
• Paid apps cost a one-time fee upfront.
• Some have both a free and paid version — read the description first.

playgroundTask.goal: You compared free and paid apps in the store

steps.say: Click on PhotoFun to see its details.
Go back to the store home.
Click on Calculator Pro to compare a free app.

drDigitalSuccess: You compared free and paid apps! Check if a free version meets your needs before buying the paid one.
drDigitalHint: Click an app name in the store to read its description and see if it's free or paid.
